description: Real consumer-style quiz prompts for the LIVE Groq release gate. No mock_bugs — the real model decides. Ground truth: a Jam is valid iff every persona is reachable with a non-empty result screen (verified by driving it in a real browser).

cases.prompt: What kind of coffee drink are you?
Which mythical creature matches your personality?
What type of houseplant are you?
What pizza topping represents your soul?
What kind of dog would you be?
Which video game genre is your life?
